lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The car is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. All mechanical components are in good working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and structural damage. The interior is heavily worn with torn seats and deep stains. Mechanical systems are unreliable and require major repairs.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. Mechanically, it performs reliably with smooth gear shifts and a responsive engine that shows no signs of immediate concern. The interior is clean and comfortable, showing only minor signs of use consistent with its age. On the exterior, the paint retains a nice luster, though a few small scratches or minor stone chips may be visible upon close inspection. All major systems, including the air conditioning and electronics, are in working order. This is a solid, dependable car ready for its next owner.

Get behind the wheel of this dependable ride! It's in fair condition, showing some honest signs of use, but it remains a solid choice for anyone looking for a functional and affordable vehicle. With a little TLC, this car has plenty of miles left to give and represents a great value!

This vehicle is in fair condition and would be a great fit for a buyer looking for a reliable daily driver who isn't concerned with minor cosmetic imperfections. The exterior shows some visible wear, including several scratches, paint fading on the hood, and a few small door dings. The interior is clean but shows its age with moderate wear on the seats and some staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the vehicle is sound and starts up without issue, though it will likely need new tires in the near future. It has been a dependable vehicle and is priced to reflect its current state.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior aesthetic, the automobile has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. A sophisticated choice for those who prioritize reliable performance and professional presentation.

Hey folks! 🚗 Up for grabs is my absolute favorite ride. It’s been so reliable and still looks fantastic! I’ve taken really solid care of it, and it drives like a dream. Perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that’s ready to hit the road today. Come check it out—you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a driver-spec E46 M3, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is delivered via a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M-differential. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS service and subframe reinforcement to maintain torsional rigidity. The suspension geometry remains precise, benefiting from recent control arm replacements. While showing minor signs of road use, the mechanical vitals are strong, offering the visceral, analog feedback enthusiasts demand.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Mechanically sound.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment featuring premium leather seating that remains firm and supple. All onboard electronics, including the navigation system and premium audio, are in perfect working order. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, with a recent full inspection and synthetic oil change just completed. The tires have excellent tread remaining, and the brake system provides firm, responsive stopping power. This is a dependable, high-quality driver for someone who values a well-cared-for machine. Full service records are available for your peace of mind.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable daily driver and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid condition—well-loved, super dependable, and still looks fantastic! It has a few minor signs of life here and there, but it runs like a champ and is totally ready for your next road trip. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it!

Offering a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. This example utilizes a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox paired with a factory M-variable differential lock for precise power delivery. Recent technical sorting includes reinforced rear subframe mounting points and a comprehensive rod bearing service. The chassis dynamics are preserved through refreshed suspension geometry and bushings, providing excellent lateral grip and communicative feedback. While showing minor cosmetic patina expected of its vintage, the drivetrain is dialed-in and ready for spirited use.
Reliable vehicle. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Recent service. Runs smooth.

This vehicle has been exceptionally well-maintained and serves as a prime example of pride of ownership. The exterior paint retains a brilliant, deep shine with only the most minor incidental marks consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery is supple with no significant wear, and all electronic features—including the dual-zone climate control, navigation, and heated seating—operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is solid, offering a smooth and responsive driving experience with a quiet engine and precise shifting. It has benefited from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule, and the tires show substantial tread depth for many miles of future travel. This is a reliable, turnkey vehicle that offers a premium feel without the new-car price tag.

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through its individual throttle bodies and high-revving valvetrain. This example benefits from a dual-VANOS overhaul and recent subframe reinforcement, addressing critical platform weaknesses. The chassis remains taut with upgraded Bilstein B16 coilovers, and power is delivered via a precise 6-speed manual to the factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its driver-grade status, the drivetrain is robust, benefiting from documented valve adjustments and rod bearing service. A visceral, analog driving experience ready for the next enthusiast.
